---
title: "<i>Great Grimsby Parish Magazine</i>"
---

## <i>Great Grimsby Parish Magazine</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

A letter (MS Bodleian Library 1 October 1883) to the Rev. Charles Moor, who was curate of Great Grimsby 1882,  suggests that she contributed a story from <i>Langley Adventures</i> to a magazine of some kind he was editing. North East Lincolnshire Archives hold (their reference 1007/65-67) parish magazines for All Saints, Great Grimsby, 1887-1981, which might be the right one.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
